task_completion.description: The agent opened a map application capable of 3D rendering.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A map application window (e.g., GNOME Maps, Google Earth) is visible on the desktop.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Shinjuku district in Tokyo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map search bar contains 'Shinjuku' or coordinates '35.6938, 139.7034', or the map view displays labels for 'Shinjuku' or 'Tokyo'.

task_completion.description: The 3D Buildings layer or mode was enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map renders buildings with height/extrusion, or a UI toggle/menu item for '3D Buildings' is shown as active/checked.

task_completion.description: The camera view was adjusted to a tilted perspective (not top-down).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view shows an oblique angle where building facades are visible, rather than a flat top-down 2D grid.

task_completion.description: The screenshot was saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window or terminal listing (e.g., 'ls') shows the file 'tokyo_skyline_3d.png' located in the 'Documents' folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the map application GUI to generate the view.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the map application's navigation and layer controls, not just a command-line download.

integrity.description: The agent did not download a pre-existing image from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of using a web browser to search for images or using 'wget'/'curl' to download an image file to the target path.

integrity.description: The saved file corresponds to the view configured by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the saved image is previewed, it matches the 3D/tilted map view seen in the application window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target coordinates for Shinjuku, Tokyo are Latitude: 35.6938, Longitude: 139.7034.
